task_completion.description: Open GCompris and navigate to the 'Puzzle of famous paintings' activity
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the GCompris application open and the 'Puzzle of famous paintings' activity selected or visible in the menu.

task_completion.description: Start the first puzzle in the activity
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the first puzzle of the activity in progress, with scattered puzzle pieces visible on the screen.
Screenshots show the puzzle pieces fully assembled into a complete painting without any gaps, typically triggering a success or completion state in GCompris.

task_completion.description: Save a screenshot of the completed puzzle to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a file manager, terminal, or image viewer confirming that a file named 'painting_solved.png' exists in '/home/ga/Documents' and contains the image of the completed puzzle.

task_completion.description: Record the name of the painting or artist in the specified text file
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a text editor or terminal output confirming that a file named 'painting_info.txt' exists in '/home/ga/Documents' and contains the name of the painting or artist.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual GCompris application
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the GCompris GUI being used to solve the puzzle, rather than the agent searching for and downloading an image of a painting from a web browser.

integrity.description: The saved screenshot is of the actual application
integrity.visual_evidence: The image saved as 'painting_solved.png' should show the GCompris interface or the specific puzzle style of the app, not a generic, high-resolution image of the artwork found online.

integrity.description: The recorded text matches the application's display
integrity.visual_evidence: The text in 'painting_info.txt' must correspond to the painting or artist name exactly as it is displayed in the GCompris application upon completing the puzzle.

privileged_info_for_vlm: GCompris Qt is a real educational software suite available in Ubuntu. The 'Puzzle of famous paintings' activity exists within it. The agent must interact with this specific application to solve the puzzle. Verify that the screenshot saved to '/home/ga/Documents/painting_solved.png' shows the completed puzzle within the GCompris interface, and that the text file at '/home/ga/Documents/painting_info.txt' contains the painting or artist name as presented by the application.
